creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Apitz from comment #14)

I think I am very well aware that it was once compiling, because I made it so.
I am also very well aware that for the newer version we need page pools and for that change LinuxKPIs notion of a page;  I have half of that done.

But I'll update drivers after almost half a year again the next days before continuing and see what else we'll need.

I'll be more than happy if you want to help the effort of then making it work?
